title: Throne of Ten Thousand Swords
synopsis: In the vast Jiang Dynasty, the culture of swordsmanship has been passed down for millennia, and the people take pride in practicing it. However, reaching its pinnacle, the "Sword God Realm," is a rare feat. Over a decade ago, the once-powerful Wuji Sword God was severely injured by the schemes of the Changsheng Sword God, forcing him to retreat into seclusion in the mountains, detached from worldly affairs. Now, Zhan Yibai, Wuji Sword God's only disciple, has finally come of age, and the time has arrived for him to embark on a journey of training as agreed upon by master and disciple. Before departing, to enhance Zhan Yibai's self-defense abilities, Wuji Sword God gifted him his personal sword and instructed him to rapidly achieve the realm of Sword God. New to the secular world, Zhan Yibai befriends Jiang Mingyue, Princess of the dynasty, and Li Kuang, the second son of the Prince of Zhennan. Hoping to rapidly grow, he and his companions participate in the "Ancient Dynasty Ruins" tria

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Wan Ren Zhi Shang
synopsis: Yi Feng traveled to the Xianjiang Continent. Since he was born without spiritual roots, he could only survive by relying on the "essential life skills" given by the system. Little did he know that in the eyes of those practitioners, his strength was already at the god level, and his every move affected the entire pattern of the Xianjiang Continent. Yi Feng easily resolved many crises without knowing it, which also brought about many passionate and hilarious scenes, and brought new opportunities and choices to the people living on this continent. (Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

title: Wu Hun Dalu
synopsis: The scientist Chu Feng accidentally obtained the “Jin Wuling” that turned into a meteorite and fell. In order to explore its origin, Chu Feng created a supercomputer “Qiyuan”. With Qiyuan's help, Chu Feng learned that Jin Wuling actually came from a place called Wuhun. The mysterious world of the continent Chu Feng also inadvertently inspired Jin Wuling's power to be transported to Wuhun Continent. In the "Wuhun Continent", Chu Feng rescued Su Manqing, the third young lady of the Su family, but thus became enmity with the Nangong and Lu clans. (Source: Bangumi, translated)

title: World of Sphira
synopsis: We follow the epic journey of three war mercenaries across three continents, more than a dozen countries, and the realm of the gods.

title: Peerless Divine Emperor
synopsis: Jing Yunxiao was once the supreme Emperor of Samsara on the Dragon Territory Continent. When faced with a conspiracy, he used the Five-Turn Samsara Technique to be reborn as a young man from the Jing family of Hongye Town. Drawing on his past life memories, Jing Yunxiao helped the Jing family overcome the threat of Black Dragon Village, but his grandfather, Jing Yufeng, was also seriously injured. Desperate, Jing Yunxiao shouldered the responsibility of saving his family and journeyed alone to Huangshi City in search of medicine. Misfortunes never come singly. The Jing family, originally an aristocratic family in the capital of Baizhan Kingdom, retreated to Hongye Town to escape the pursuit of the God of War Palace. Jing Yunxiao's reappearance caught the attention of the God of War Palace. To eliminate the root of the problem, the God of War Palace dispatched the assassin organization, the Dark Feather Palace, to Huangshi City to assassinate Jing Yunxiao. Meanwhile, Jing Yunxiao, in pu

title: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
titleRomaji: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
synopsis: The young Qin Feng, hailed as a once-in-a-millennium prodigy in the Wuji Nation, was framed and his entire family was wiped out, leaving him alone. After his martial veins were crippled, he was cast into a small, remote sect to fend for himself. Determined to become stronger and seek revenge, he endured constant bullying, often protected by his kind-hearted Second Senior Sister, who shared a common fate. Unbeknownst to everyone, Qin Feng had already secretly embarked on the arduous path of physical cultivation. Upon learning that three members of his sect were eligible to train at the Tiandao Academy, and with the spots already secured, he broke free from his humiliation. Upon being humiliated once again by the sect's prodigy, Yun Tianyu, he revealed his physical cultivation identity and violently assaulted Yun Tianyu, shocking everyone. Afterwards, he took the initiative, repeatedly teaching Yun Tianyu a lesson, openly challenging the protective Great Elder, and vowing to get a spot i

title: Zashikiro
synonyms: 極彩色肉筆絵巻 座敷牢
synopsis: Born in Asuka Village, Sakichi was discriminated against by the villagers because of his appearance. One day, Sakichi discovered Reiko being held captive in a large mansion. Sakichi infiltrates the mansion to rescue her, only to find it to be a trick mansion filled with various traps and mazes. (Source: Kanazawa Film Fest 2025 Website, translated) Note: Production began in 1992 following the completion of MIDORI, with Harada working on the film single-handedly and funding it himself.

title: The Girl Who Stole Time
synopsis: Qian Xiao, a cheerful girl from a fishing village, dreams of becoming an actress in the big city. On her way towards the metropolis, a sudden crash changes everything. Fortunately, she survives—and as a bonus, she obtains the Time Dial, a mysterious pendant which gives her the ability to control time. As she excitedly experiments with her newfound power, Qian Xiao becomes the target of a criminal cabal. Seventeen, an assassin from that group, enters her life. What adventure will unfold when a cold-faced, obsessive-compulsive killer and a carefree village girl cross paths? (Source: Fantasia Festival)

tags.name: Advertisement
tags.description: Produced in order to promote the products of a certain company.

title: Shen Zai Jiong Tu
synopsis: A divine master accidentally fell into the mortal realm, losing all his magical powers. He'd spent millennia trying to unlock the secrets of ascension, only to discover that the first step was to return to earth, starting all over again! The divine master had intended to emulate other cultivators and plunge into arduous cultivation, but who could have imagined that a chef, appearing out of nowhere, would unexpectedly unlock a new path for him to "level up through food." Having lived on spiritual energy and dew since childhood, when had the noble divine master of the Ninth Heaven ever encountered such down-to-earth human delicacies? He loved to eat, to eat more, and to fight over the food! It wasn't until he'd collected every delicacy in the world, with those kneeling before him in submission, that the divine master realized: I'd eaten myself into invincibility! (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Zhongguo Qitan 2
synopsis: The second season of Zhongguo Qitan . A collection of 9 short movies about Chinese folklore "monsters".

title: Zhu Bajie Chi Xigua
synopsis: One of China's earliest paper-cut animation films. On their pilgrimage to the West, Tang Sanzang, Sun Wukong, and Zhu Bajie rest in a desert. They were thirsty and tired, and went into a temple which they thought was deserted. Zhu Bajie was yelling about his stomach aching after walking for a while, so Sun Wukong scouted ahead for food, warning him not to be lazy. Zhu Bajie soon finds a huge watermelon and divided it into four pieces to share. However, after eating the largest piece, he cannot resist the temptation of the watermelon, and ate the rest. Sun Wukong sees this, and decides to magically punish him. (Source: Douban)

title: Shen Hai Yu Jin
synopsis: On that day, the fog blocked everything. On that day, he became the captain of a ghost ship. On that day, he stepped through the thick fog and confronted a completely subverted and fragmented world— the old order had vanished, strange phenomena dominated the endless seas beyond civilized society, and isolated island city-states and fleets of ships challenged the sea that had become the last ember of lights for the civilized world. All of this while the shadows of the old days were still stirring in the deep sea, waiting to devour this world that was about to die. But for the new captain of the ghost ship Vanished, there was only one question he had to consider first — Who knows how to steer this ship?!

title: Lang Lang Shan Xiao Yao Guai
titleRomaji: Lang Lang Shan Xiao Yao Guai
synopsis: The little pig demon decided to leave Langlang Mountain and form a grassroots team with the toad demon, the weasel demon, and the gorilla demon, to start the journey to the west. (Source: IMDb)

title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
titleRomaji: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
synopsis: Jiuyue, an ordinary working fox, and his fellow gods Ao Lie , Nezha , Xiaotian , and Xiaoyu , accidentally stumble into a game world full of traps. Jiuyue, who loves playing games, actively participates in the adventure, hoping to prove himself by leading his friends who are not good at games to pass the levels. However, this plan suddenly changes due to the appearance of two top game bosses. At the same time, the seemingly happy game world is quietly brewing a dramatic change that threatens all players. The little weakling seriously ignites his fighting spirit and tries to weave his destiny with courage! If nothing unexpected happens, something unexpected should happen...
